title: Academic Program

hero.heading:
Bring Ethereum to your campus
ahead of Devcon 8
hero.body: Shape the next generation of Ethereum builders at your campus and bring your community to Devcon in Mumbai this November.

community_banner: The Road to Devcon starts here, on your campus.

why_join.heading: Why join the Devcon 8 Academic Program?

items.title: Bring your campus on the Road to Devcon
items.body: Every meetup is part of a global series building toward Devcon 8. Hosting one makes your university part of that story, and gets your community there first.

items.title: Find your people ahead of Devcon India
items.body: Connect with researchers, developers, and protocol contributors who share your enthusiasts, and your obsessions.

items.title: Turn your campus into a classroom for Ethereum
items.body: The expertise is already around you: professors, researchers, and builders in your own university who are working on the hardest problems in the space.

who_can_apply.heading: Who can apply
who_can_apply.intro: We support initiatives such as introductory talks, technical workshops, panel discussions, research presentations, hackathons, or meetups that:
bullets: Align with Ethereum's core values, including censorship resistance, open source, privacy, and security
Contribute to the Ethereum ecosystem's growth
Take place between 15 May and 15 October, 2026

what_you_can_receive.heading: What you can receive
bullets: Up to $300 USD in financial support per event
Devcon tickets (free or discounted) for faculty and top student applicants
Amplification of your event through Devcon channels

apply.pill_text: Bring the Road to Devcon to your campus!
apply.contact_note: We review applications on a rolling basis and will get back to you within 15 days. Got a question? Contact us at

other_support.heading: Discount applications
other_support.body_intro: Ticket support is intended to enable participation at Devcon, reward meaningful contributions, and support initiatives with clear ecosystem impact.
bullets: All ticket requests are curated and limited per round
Discounted prices increase over time. Applying earlier gives access to lower price tiers, subject to availability and review.
other_support.body_outro: Ticket options unlock on different dates and have limited spots per round. Please check availability and release dates.

faq.q: Who can apply for a discounted ticket?
faq.a: Discounted tickets are available through applications for students, builders, and ecosystem contributors. Each category has its own eligibility criteria and pricing. Applications are reviewed and tickets are limited per round.
